questionHtml:
In the first month of a reforestation program, the town of Neerim plants 85 trees. Each subsequent month the number of trees planted will increase by an additional 30 trees.

The number of trees to be planted in each of the first three months are shown in the following table.

Find the mean number of trees planted per month during the first 15 months.
markschemeHtml:
442515  OR  85+8-1×30                    (M1)

295                    A1


Note: Accept 295.333… from use of 3sf value from part (b).

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the mean number of trees planted per month during the first 15 months.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.3—Mean, median, mode. Mean of grouped data, standard deviation. Quartiles, IQR
